title: Variables Challenge
description: Put your variable knowledge to the test! Create a complete farm inventory system.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Alright Qubit, time for a challenge! Let's build a simple farm inventory system using everything you've learned!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: You'll need to track: wheat count (number), crop name (string), and if you're ready to sell (boolean).

phases.title: Track the Count
phases.description: Create a number variable for wheat count

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: First, let's track how much wheat we have. Type: wheat_count = 25

phases.title: Name the Crop
phases.description: Create a string variable for the crop name

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now let's store the crop name. Type: crop_name = "Golden Wheat"

phases.title: Ready to Sell?
phases.description: Create a boolean to check if ready

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now let's determine if we have enough to sell. We need at least 20 wheat.

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: The >= means 'greater than or equal to'. Since 25 >= 20, ready_to_sell is True!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's create a status message! We'll combine the crop name with the count.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: str() converts the number to text so we can combine them!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: The status now says 'Golden Wheat inventory: 25'!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now let's print everything! Type: print(status)

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Click play to run your complete inventory system!

objectives.description: Click play to run your code

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: AMAZING! You've completed the Variables Challenge!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: I can track numbers, text, and true/false values now!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: You've mastered the foundation of programming! Variables will be used in everything we do from now on!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Ready to learn how to make decisions in your code? Let's explore conditionals!
